proposal_text: This research proposes to analyse anonymised Dublin Bus and Luas smart card tap-on data to model public transport usage patterns across different times of day, routes, and weather conditions, while prioritising data protection through a bias audit and providing an appeal mechanism for any concerns raised by stakeholders. The dataset consists of aggregated journey counts per route per hour provided by the National Transport Authority under an open data licence. No individual passenger records are included and no re-identification is possible from the aggregated data. The analysis will use time series forecasting and clustering algorithms to identify underserved routes and peak demand periods. Results will be shared with Dublin City Council to inform transport planning decisions. The environmental impact of the computational resources required for the analysis will be documented. No AI system will be deployed in any operational context.

retrieved_risk_categories.label: Environmental Harm
retrieved_risk_categories.definition: Risk of negative environmental impact including carbon footprint, resource consumption, or ecological damage from AI systems.

retrieved_risk_categories.label: Democratic Process Harm
retrieved_risk_categories.definition: Risk of undermining democratic institutions, electoral processes, or civic participation through AI systems.

retrieved_risk_categories.label: Psychological Harm
retrieved_risk_categories.definition: Risk of mental distress, manipulation, coercion, or emotional damage caused by an AI system.

assessment.risk_summary: This research proposal involves processing aggregated public transport data to model usage patterns, which may have a negative environmental impact due to computational resources required. The analysis will also inform transport planning decisions, potentially affecting democratic processes. The research prioritizes data protection through a bias audit and appeal mechanism, but the environmental impact of the analysis needs to be documented.

identified_risks.explanation: The research proposal does not explicitly state how the environmental impact will be documented.
